item.title: Review of Midnight's Library
item.description: The modern novel is dead. I spent the entire day yesterday reading what was supposed to be wonderful work of fiction by the acclaimed Matt Haig. The enterprise was bound to succeed. An acclaimed British author writes a novel which is published by a major publisher, has relentless marketing done on multiple media, is on the bestsellers list of many list makers and has even won the Goodreads Choice 2020 award.

item.title: Why morality is objective
item.description: In this age of diverse cultures and traditions, morality is commonly defined differently by each segment of the human race. I use segment here as a general abstraction of any groping of humans, could be on religious, ethnic, demographic, social class lines etc. Historically, there have been different cultures, traditions and what may be the norm in a culture might be immoral in the other. Bull fights are common place in Spain, but constitute animal abuse in India.

item.title: Darshan Chaudhary
item.description: I am working as a software developer.
